message:
refactor(node): move tempfile to runtime dependency, gate migration module, and reorganize main.rs imports

Cargo.toml:
- Move tempfile from [dev-dependencies] to [dependencies] — needed at
  runtime for sidecar staging directories in the migration path

lib.rs:
- Gate migration module behind cfg(any(test, feature = "extended-surfaces"))
  since migration logic depends on extended surface types
- Gate root_pointer module behind cfg(feature = "extended-surfaces")

main.rs:
- Move crate::cli import block to the top of the file (before external
  imports) for consistency with Rust idioms
- Remove frankenengine_node::migration import (migration is now a local
  mod in the binary crate since it needs binary-specific paths)
- Add `mod migration` declaration in the binary crate
- Rustfmt: reformat import line wrapping in supply_chain and tools
  use blocks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
